description: A lightweight AI browser automation agent framework
Claude Code skill for comprehensive website design research using browser-automation agent teams
Self-hosted chat client for Ollama, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Web UI and terminal CLI, with web search and a browser-automation agent.
Typescript port of the browser-use browser automation agent
A local browser automation agent based on Microsoft Fara-7B model optimized for LM Studio inference.
A minimal browser automation agent using Google's Gemini 2.5 Computer Use Preview model and Playwright for web browser control.

Browser-automation agent for Chrome — natural-language tasks executed through native tool calling, scoped Skills, CDP keyboard control, and a confirm-before-act security model. BYOK across 8 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek + 4 China-region).
An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that wraps Amazon Nova Act — AWS's browser automation agent
Natural language browser automation agent built with ConnectOnion and Playwright
A robust CLI powering autonomous web agents. Seamlessly integrate Playwright, browser-use, and LangChain to automate your daily web workflows.

AI-powered browser automation agent using a dual-LLM architecture. The orchestrator (qwen3-vl-32k) creates execution plans from screenshots, while the executor (llama3.1:8b) translates steps into browser actions using an accessibility tree for reliable element selection. Local, private, powered by Ollama.

A fully human-like browser automation agent with advanced hardware fingerprint spoofing. Designed to mask digital identities and bypass advanced bot detection by simulating realistic user behavior and altering hardware signals.
A browser automation agent using Tzafon's computer use API.
Go-based evaluation orchestrator for running Mix Eval tasks using browser automation agents

OpenBrowser Frontend, A modern chat interface for OpenBrowser AI. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, this frontend provides a sleek dark-themed UI for interacting with browser automation agents.
A CLI-based browser automation agent designed for seamless LLM and human collaboration.
Self-improving browser automation agent that learns from failures using vector search and Stagehand
A Cloudflare Worker that exposes an AI-powered browser automation agent as an API
Generic browser automation agent. Define workflows in YAML, execute them with a native binary. Built with Go + rod.
Visual browser automation agent using Google ADK, Playwright, and the A2A protocol — with live noVNC streaming on Cloud Run
Nava is a Python & Web based AI browser automation agent that lets you control the web with natural language.
Browser automation using langgraph, LLM

AI-powered browser automation agent that autonomously completes web forms using Amazon Bedrock models and Playwright. Demonstrates agentic workflows with episodic memory, accessibility tree analysis, and semantic element discovery.

Browser-DPO-Agent is an industrial-grade browser automation agent training framework that innovatively adopts Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) technology to provide a new solution for AI agents to learn human-preferred web operations.
An intelligent browser automation agent system through chrome extension
AI Agent monorepo — macOS agent, browser automation agent, graph context engine
A lightweight browser automation agent powered by Google's Gemini AI and Playwright.
AutoMatt - AI Browser Automation Agent (UI&CLI) to automate every web based workflow.
Generic browser automation agent with self-correction and 7-tier locator ladder. Built on Playwright + Claude.
An MCP-based browser automation agent for replicating and interacting with the 12306 China Railway booking system.
Professional browser automation agent. Self-healing, self-learning AI that investigates, configures, and troubleshoots the web. Chrome extension.
Stealth browser automation agent for Claude Code via MCP. Session pool, anti-detection, human-like interaction, autonomous browsing.
AI agent for browser automation
Browser automation for AI agents. Playwright/Puppeteer web scraping, form filling, data collection.
AI-powered browser automation with Playwright and OpenAI. Navigate sites, detect elements, click, and fill forms from natural language commands in a simple, modular Node.js setup.

This project implements an end-to-end Autonomous Browser Automation Agent using Browser-Use and Playwright for goal-driven web navigation, with multi-step planning, self-correcting execution loops, and structured data extraction powered by Ollama (local) or Groq, and deployable via a Streamlit UI.
Free local browser automation agent powered by Gemma4 27B + Ollama. Ranked 3rd on Browser-Use Stealth Bench V1 (67.1%) — outperforming most paid cloud services.
